get.summary: List accounts or get by ID
get.description: Returns a single account if ?id= is provided, or a list of all accounts. Supports tag filtering via ?tag.key=value.

get.description: Get the status and result of an async breakdown analysis. Returns the full result when status is completed or embedding.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Analysis ID returned from POST /v1/analyze with mode=breakdown (e.g. va_xxx)

get.summary: List assets or get by ID
get.description: Returns a single asset if ?id= is provided, or a list. Filter by ?type=video or ?tag.key=value.

get.summary: List posts or get by ID
get.description: Returns a single post if ?id= is provided, or a list of posts. Filter by ?accountId= or ?tag.key=value.
